description: Blocker for FN-006: Dependencies FN-007 and FN-005 are not marked as "done". FN-007 is in In Progress (all steps complete but not moved to done). FN-005 is in In Progress (step 6: Documentation & Delivery pending). FN-006 requires both dependencies to be fully complete and marked done before execution can proceed.
summary: FN-021 (deprecated duplicate of FN-017) is complete. All steps (Preflight, Monitor FN-017, Archive Deprecated Task) were already executed. FN-021 is archived, no duplicate work was performed under FN-021, and the dependent FN-017 scope was handled via its active task.

log.action: Primary planning model returned without APPROVE (fn_review_spec was never called) — reminder 1/2

log.outcome: The PROMPT.md for FN-021 contains only a "DUPLICATE: FN-017" statement with no additional context, missing all required spec components. It fails to define a mission, steps, file scope, testing requirements, or documentation guidelines, making it impossible to verify alignment with project needs or execute the task.

The specification is well-structured with clear, verifiable steps and accurate file/dependency references, but it creates a redundant duplicate task (FN-021) of an existing in-review task (FN-017), which introduces risk of duplicate effort, conflicting task board updates, or workflow confusion.

The specification for deprecated task FN-021 is clear, correctly identifies itself as a duplicate of active task FN-017, and includes verifiable administrative steps for monitoring and archiving. Minor missing documentation sections do not block approval as no code or content changes are required.
